creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a dup of ports/5894 which was fixed and closed.  Get the newest 
version of the port in question.  Note that your patch was not applied --- 
see followups to ports/5894 for explanation.  The one nit raised by Eivend 
will soon be addressed and is actually specifically unrelated to the pr's 
ports/5894 and ports/5913.
